case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ABSOLUTE GRAPHIC SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION D/B/A U.S. BANK EQUIPMENT FINANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABSOLUTE GRAPHIC SOLUTIONS, INC. $96,061.32 PRINCIPAL, $1,394.96 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97,906.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ABSOLUTE GRAPHIC SOLUTIONS, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF ENTRY; CIVIL CASE COVER (TRANSACTION ID # 100011060) FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION D/B/A U.S. BANK EQUIPMENT FINANCE SERVED FEB-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABSOLUTE GRAPHIC SOLUTIONS, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ABSOLUTE GRAPHIC SOLUTIONS, INC.
